Along with the ''[[Darkvenge]]'', the '''''Keeper''''' was one of the two [[Lucrehulk-class battleship/Legends|Lucrehulk-class battleships]] in the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Special Task Force One]].

It was destroyed by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], along with most of the force, in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
In the fourth scene of chapter 16 (page 270 of the hardcover edition) of ''Outbound Flight'', [[Siv Kav]] mistakenly calls the ''Keeper'' the ''Seeker''.

==Appearances==
*[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] {{Ab|Outbound Flight (unabridged audiobook)}}
